name: Chocolate Cake with Surprise Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend sugar and margarine in a bowl until smooth. Add cocoa and egg yolks; mix well.
2. Alternately add buttermilk and flour to the mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
3. Beat egg whites with vanilla extract until soft peaks form. Fold into the batter using a spatula or whisk.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13x9-inch baking pan. Alternatively, pour into two 8-inch or 9-inch diameter cake pans lined with wax paper.
Surprise Filling:
8 ounces (1 package) Cream Cheese, softened
0.5 cup Sugar
1 Egg
1 dash Salt
0.5 cup Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips
Instructions for Surprise Filling:
1. Blend cream cheese, sugar, egg, and salt in a bowl until smooth.
2. Stir in chocolate chips.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the filling over the cake batter in the pan. Alternatively, drop onto cupcakes filled 2/3 full with batter.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes, or until the cake pulls away from the side of the pan.
This recipe yields approximately 30-32 servings.
